channel.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário

item.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário
item.description:
🚨 Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica
Visão geral:
• 0 com severidade Crítica
• 12 com severidade Alta
• 26 novas CVEs
• 3 novos advisories/exploits

────────────────────────────────────
Infraestrutura - Docker / ESX / Elastic / Grafana / Nginx / VMware / Zabbix

🚨 Endor Patches | CVE-2026-45633, Dokploy: Command Injection in /docker-container-logs Endpoint - Endor Labs
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata a vulnerabilidade CVE-2026-45633 associada a Docker. Vale consultar o link para verificar impacto, versões afetadas e orientações de correção.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE11SVcxc1l5Tm1yQld3WUdwX2FjWHRjdl9uWDZYSW9uUzNjTTd2NTVyWmRpbHBFX3hvUGV3UzJhOTlUOW14Mm91T0dOYTItNUxLazZ1WDMxcm1EMFlPbzZkQVVfbFc?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Segurança - Acronis / Axur / Check Point / Harmony SASE / Qualys / SentinelOne

💣 Researcher Details WhatsApp-to-Host Attack Chain Using Three OpenClaw Flaws
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 8.8
Resumo:
Details have emerged about three now-patched security flaws in the OpenClaw personal artificial intelligence (AI) assistant that, if successfully exploited, could enable credential theft, privilege escalation, and arbitrary code execution on the host. A brief description of the high-severity vulnerabilities is as follows - GHSA-hjr6-g723-hmfm (CVSS score: 8.8) - An operating system
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/07/researcher-details-whatsapp-to-host.html
 
💣 Attackers Exploit 'Ill Bloom' Vulnerability to Drain Over $5 Million From Cryptocurrency Wallets
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Security firm Coinspect has disclosed a crypto wallet flaw it calls Ill Bloom, and attackers are already using it. The flaw is in how some wallet software generated its recovery phrase, the words that control the money. When that phrase is made with weak randomness, an attacker can work it out and take everything it controls. The firm has confirmed one coordinated sweep on May 27
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/07/attackers-exploit-ill-bloom.html
 
📰 Former ransomware negotiator gets 4 years for BlackCat attacks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A former employee of cybersecurity incident response company DigitalMint was sentenced to 70 months in prison for targeting U.S. companies in BlackCat (ALPHV) ransomware attacks.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/us-ransomware-negotiator-gets-4-years-in-prison-for-blackcat-attacks/
 
📰 Ransomware Negotiator Gets 70 Months in Prison for Aiding BlackCat Attacks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A 41-year-old former ransomware negotiator has been sentenced to nearly six years (i.e., 70 months) in prison in the U.S. for their role in conspiring with the now-defunct BlackCat ransomware operators to extort multiple victims and working with two other cybersecurity professionals to target additional victims in 2023. In a sentencing memorandum, federal prosecutors described Martino as a "
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/07/ransomware-negotiator-gets-70-months-in.html
 
📰 Zimbra urges customers to patch critical web client XSS flaw
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The Zimbra security team urged customers to patch a critical vulnerability affecting the Classic Web Client used to access the Zimbra Collaboration suite.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/zimbra-urges-customers-to-patch-critical-web-client-xss-flaw/
 
📰 New Helix vishing group emerges in SharePoint data theft attacks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A new data-extortion group called Helix is using identity-focused tactics such as voice phishing (vishing), device code phishing, and multi-factor authentication (MFA) abuse to steal data from SharePoint environments.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/new-helix-vishing-group-emerges-in-sharepoint-data-theft-attacks/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Sistemas / Cloud - 1Password / Azure / Office / Ubuntu / Windows Server / WordPress

🚨 CVE-2026-54772 - Windows Server
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Windows Server
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.5
Resumo:
CoreWCF is a port of the service side of Windows Communication Foundation (WCF) to .NET Core. Prior to 1.8.1 and 1.9.1, an unauthenticated remote attacker that can reach a NetTcpBinding, NetNamedPipeBinding, or UnixDomainSocketBinding endpoint can trigger premature EOF handling in the CoreWCF net.tcp, net.pipe, or net.uds framing handshake and pin one server thread-pool worker at full CPU per connection. This issue i...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-54772
 
🚨 CVE-2026-5523 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 8.8
Resumo:
The Divi Form Builder plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Missing Authorization in versions up to, and including, 5.1.8. This is due to the update_user() function accepting a user ID parameter from form submissions without verifying that the authenticated user has permission to edit that specific user account, and the handle_register_submission() function only checking if any user is logged in rather than validatin...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-5523
 
🚨 USN-8523-1: libsoup vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: 8.0
Resumo:
Eric Su and Samuel Dainard discovered that libsoup incorrectly handled content with zero-length resources. An attacker could possibly use this issue to trigger a buffer over-read, resulting in information disclosure or a denial of service. This issue only affected Ubuntu 18.04 LTS, Ubuntu 20.04 LTS, Ubuntu 22.04 LTS, Ubuntu 24.04 LTS, Ubuntu 25.10, and Ubuntu 26.04 LTS. (CVE-2026-2369) Kona Arctic discovered that lib...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8523-1
 
🚨 USN-8530-1: Linux kernel (AWS) vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It was discovered that the Linux kernel did not properly handle shared page fragments during socket buffer operations, collectively known as Dirty Frag. A logic flaw existed in the XFRM ESP-in-TCP subsystem and in the RxRPC networking subsystem when processing paged fragments. A local attacker could use this to escalate privileges, or possibly escape a container. (CVE-2026-43284) It was discovered that a logic flaw e...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8530-1
 
💣 Attackers Exploit WordPress Plugin Vulnerabilities for Remote Code Execution and Webshell Access - gbhackers.com
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia trata de uma falha de execução remota de código relacionada a WordPress, com potencial impacto importante em ambientes expostos ou mal segmentados.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTFBLWE5YSkstM3FWUkgyNXEwMC1lTGZvVjI5TFBtaXA3a2lLRDBic01SWXFJaHZIcERrWmR5Y0NPMTNWSGxteTBZQ0FzRXlyZU9MR0hXUllXWmptQlpacl9qMmlfR0xHUQ?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Período: Notícias do período de 08/07/2026 até 10/07/2026.
